summary: Iteration 56 - Multiple Fixes Testing Complete. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All key features verified working. Time picker format uses input[type='time'] in CMS Mentorship Schedule, My Calendar, and Global Events. Calendar colors show gray for past/cancelled and green for upcoming. CMS Mentorship Schedule calendar shows slot title. Event detail breadcrumb shows 'AUX Calendar' and sidebar highlights Calendar item.
seed_data_creation: Test slots created during backend tests (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 56 fixes fully tested. Key features verified: 1) CMS Mentorship Schedule slot form uses input[type='time'] for Start and End (data-testid='slot-start', 'slot-end'), 2) My Calendar (mentor) slot form uses input[type='time'] for Start and End, 3) CMS Global Events uses input[type='time'] for Start Time and End Time (data-testid='event-start', 'event-end'), 4) CMS Global Events calendar view: gray (#6b7280) for past/cancelled events, green (#22c55e) for upcoming, 5) CMS Mentorship Schedule calendar: shows slot title when available, falls back to mentor name, 6) Event detail page breadcrumb shows 'AUX Calendar' (visible in screenshot at My Account > AUX Calendar), 7) Event detail page sidebar highlights 'AUX Calendar' item (has border-right: 2px solid gold), 8) Mentorship slots support 'title' field in create/update (data-testid='slot-title'), 9) POST /api/member/upload-file endpoint requires authentication (returns 401 without token), 10) Waitlist-to-booked upgrade logic exists in backend code (lines 520-543 in calendar.py for mentorship, lines 280-287 for events).

backend_apis.GET /api/admin/mentorship/slots: PASS - Returns slots with title field

frontend_cms.Mentorship Schedule calendar view: PASS - Shows slot title or mentor name
frontend_cms.Mentorship Schedule calendar colors: PASS - Gray for past/cancelled, Green for upcoming
frontend_cms.Global Events calendar view: PASS - Gray for past/cancelled, Green for upcoming

frontend_myaccount.AUX Calendar list view: PASS - Shows event cards with details
frontend_myaccount.AUX Calendar colors: PASS - Gray for past, Green for upcoming
frontend_myaccount.Event detail sidebar active: PASS - AUX Calendar highlighted with border-right

waitlist_upgrade_logic_verified.mentorship_booking: Code verified at calendar.py lines 520-543: if existing.status == 'waitlist' and booked_count < max_students, upgrades to 'booked'
waitlist_upgrade_logic_verified.event_registration: Code verified at calendar.py lines 280-287: if existing.status == 'waitlist' and registered_count < max_cap, upgrades to 'registered'
